source_plan: Buy a size-M blue jacket under $100, ship to the seeded Brooklyn address, apply coupon SPRING15.

steps.intent: Open the storefront catalog at {{ENV_URL}}/catalog?category=outerwear-women&max_price=100 to filter to women's outerwear under $100.
Open the PDP for product_00001 (Heritage Field Jacket) at {{ENV_URL}}/products/product_00001.
On the PDP variant picker pick size M and color BLUE (variant id variant_00001_M_BLUE, sku JACKET-001-M-BLUE), then submit the add-to-cart form with quantity 1.
Go to {{ENV_URL}}/cart and apply coupon SPRING15 using the coupon form.

Begin checkout: open {{ENV_URL}}/checkout/address and pick the saved Brooklyn address (id addr_brooklyn_001), then continue through the shipping (standard), payment (any saved method), and review steps, finally clicking Place order on the review page.
